codeReview.summary: Reviewed feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit a90f050. The diff correctly adds Zod validation to POST /api/auth (non-empty string token) and resolves publish route typing by removing the unsafe cast and static-importing encryptToken. The dashboard prompt caching behavior required by this feature is present at the reviewed commit state in TodaysPrompt (cache read on mount, fetch only when no same-day cache, refresh button bypasses cache), and the audited POST/PATCH routes in scope include Zod validation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker marked skill procedure as followed, but there is no agent-browser usage in the transcript even though this feature's expected behavior and verification steps include a dashboard UI caching check.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md requires agent-browser for UI features/manual verification; mission features entry for fix-dashboard-caching-and-zod includes UI verification step; worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for session 3376d6aa-22d5-43e2-9ad7-bde0db9f0b50 shows no agent-browser tool call.

summary: Pass: no blocking or non-blocking code defects were identified in the reviewed implementation and expected backend validation/type-fix behavior is satisfied by the commit and repository state.
